overview.description: Costco Wholesale Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the operation of membership warehouses in the United States, Puerto Rico, Canada, Mexico, Japan, the United Kingdom, Korea, Australia, Taiwan, China, Spain, France, Iceland, New Zealand, and Sweden. It offers merchandise, including sundries, dry groceries, candies, coolers, freezers, deli, liquor, and tobacco; non-food merchandise comprising appliances, small electronics, health and beauty aids, hardware, lawn and garden, sporting goods, tires, toys and seasonal, automotiv...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Costco's revenue was $275.24 billion, an increase of 8.17% compared to the previous year's $254.45 billion. Earnings were $8.10 billion, an increase of 9.94%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 37 analysts, the average rating for COST stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $1,082.94, which is an increase of 14.93% from the latest price.

data.title: Costco, Exxon, and 17 More Winners if the Market Drops
data.text: These stocks can hold their ground, or even gain, when the market falls. And a garden variety correction—a 10% drop or more—is quite possible.

data.title: Costco fires back over lawsuit tied to iconic product as shoppers claim false advertising
data.text: Costco is fighting a class-action lawsuit claiming its famous $5 rotisserie chicken is misleadingly labeled “no preservatives.”

data.title: Costco quietly rolls back prices on popular Kirkland products in member-friendly move
data.text: The retail giant lowered prices on select private-label goods as Costco executives reiterated a commitment to delivering value to members, according to a recent earnings call.

data.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Reports May Sales Results

data.title: Costco Wholesale Transcript: Monthly Sales Update May 2026
data.text: Net sales for May rose 14.5% to $24.01 billion, with comparable sales up 12.5% and digitally enabled sales up 21.1%. Strongest growth was seen in the Midwest, Southeast, Northeast, and key international markets, with gas and ancillary businesses leading category gains.

data.title: Costco is selling wild amounts of protein as whey shortages loom
data.text: Protein-packed foods and drinks are a huge hit at Costco, the company said last week. The popularity of GLP-1 drugs is fueling a broad demand for added protein in just about everything.

data.title: Costco says its gas stations set all-time volume records as shoppers search for cheap fuel
data.text: Costco's gas stations have seen a rise in demand for their low-priced gasoline, as the surge helped the company top expectations for its third-quarter sales.

data.title: Costco says its gas stations set all-time volume records as consumers seek lower-priced fuel
data.text: Costco topped third-quarter sales expectations as its gas stations hit record volumes amid surging fuel prices and growing consumer price sensitivity.

data.title: Higher gas prices are driving people to membership retailers — and Costco is the latest to benefit
data.text: Costco's same-store sales rose 9.8% during its third quarter, well above Wall Street's estimates, as gasoline sales provided a nice bump.

data.title: Costco Wholesale Earnings Call Transcript: Q3 2026
data.text: Q3 2026 saw net income rise 15% and net sales up 11.6%, with record gas volumes and strong digital growth. Membership fee income increased 10.7%, and executive memberships grew 9.6%. Continued investment in new warehouses, digital, and AI is expected to drive future growth.
